label: ACCESS360 — Hologram 4G poll
info: Polls the gateway SIM's Hologram usage and publishes access360/<gw>/sim/usage (retained). Replaces the standalone hologram-poller container. Set HOLOGRAM_API_KEY (and optionally HOLOGRAM_DEVICE_ID/GATEWAY_SN/POLL_INTERVAL_S) as env vars on this tab.

name: build request
→ sim/usage
